comment.body:
uhh... i need to dig more into it, but now the pic is very unclear tbh... it is not the time when funds are investing... it is the time when they are building hedges and scalp intraday on mean reversion trading.
It is crucial!

what we know is that the economy is in a supply side generated inflation. If the inflation is not stopped, it will flips into a deflationary spiral. this is why Trump decided to take inflation down even risking a recession.
big bank and investment fund CEOs said a few weeks ago in a private meeting that they have every tool to take a put on a recession, so no fear from the gov side of any recession. 
don't worry.

and investors are waiting for the signal (truce) to materialize, and then they start to buy, betting on growth.
vol will remain high, but everything will be as normal.
thats the plan at least.

but US- Russia- ME market will bloom, and EU markets shift towards china and US... 

but this is something that cannot be predicted now... we see the tendencies.. but these kind of things literally depend on how these leaders decide

comment.body:
Guys, the key is:
Vol events NEVER ... i repeat: NEVER occur when market is hedged. They occur when market is complacent about something and it misprices the risk. 
Like in last July. Spot up/vol up, tech squeeze, while I kept posting on twitter about that the Fed wants to cut rates in sept, but they need room for that. They must cut bcs of election, and to boost the growth in election year. But for that they need room. No rate cut at ATHs.
Then boom... market fell like no tomorrow

Market i misinterprets the risk of the tariffs. It is complacent. Perfect bulltrap. Even SPX/LTY correlation is positive. 
Only that CDS is telling us that it doesn't resonates well with each other... something is off. and you have to understand the story.
comment.raw_body:

Then boom... market fell like no tomorrow
